la: Post magnum tonitruum, Donald Trump contra "communistas" agit. In oratione occasione CCL anniversarii in USA, Praeses Trump monuit de asserto imminente takeu patriae per "communistas".

en: Stream, Gatsch, Forest: Into wild childhood [premium]. Out of the classroom, out into the open air, out of the comfort zone: the summer holidays are here and offer space for joy and lightness. And the question: How wild should, can and should it get?
la: Amnis, Gatsch, Forest: In infantiam [premium]. Ex schola, in sub dio, e suggesto: feriae aestivae hic sunt, et spatium laetitiae et levitatis praebent. Et interrogatio: Quomodo fera debet, potest et debet habere?

content:

de: 250 Jahre USA: Trump feiert sich und nennt Demokraten Kommunisten. Der Präsident nutzte das Jubiläum für die Konfrontation mit der Opposition. Die National Mall in Washington war wegen eines Gewitters zwischenzeitlich evakuiert.
en: 250 years of the USA: Trump celebrates himself and calls Democrats communists. The president used the anniversary to confront the opposition. The National Mall in Washington was temporarily evacuated due to a thunderstorm.
la: 250 annos USA: Trump celebrat se et democratas communistas vocat. Praesidens anniversarium opponendae oppositioni usus est. Nationalis pretium in Washington tempus ob tonitrui emissus est.

de: BILD-Reporter bei Trumps USA-Feier - „Die MAGA-Bewegung steht eisern hinter ihm“. Das von Donald Trump angekündigte Spektakel anlässlich des 250. Geburtstags der USA wird kurzzeitig von einem Gewitter gestoppt. Der US-Präsident kann seine Rede mit Verzögerung aber doch noch halten.
en: BILD reporter at Trump's USA celebration - "The MAGA movement is firmly behind him". The spectacle announced by Donald Trump to mark the 250th birthday of the USA is briefly stopped by a thunderstorm. The US President can still give his speech after a delay.
la: BILD nuntius apud Trump scriptor celebrationem USA - "Motus est MAGA post eum firmiter". Spectaculum a Donald Trump denuntiatum ut dies 250 natalis USA notaret brevissime procellis sistitur. Praeses US adhuc post dilationem orationem suam dare potest.

en: No wool socks in the desert [premium]. Morocco in June may not be an ideal travel destination for someone who can't tolerate the heat well. Although: Such a little rain dance will probably become more and more common in the Viennese summers in the future.

de: Krasse Wetter-Gegensätze: Neuer Hitzewelle geht Gefahr schwerer Sturmböen voraus. Ganz Deutschland spricht über die alte und die kommende Hitzewelle. Dabei wird es regional erst einmal alles andere als hochsommerlich. Schwere Sturmböen erinnern teilweise nicht nur an Herbstwetter, sie werden zur ernsthaften Gefahr.
en: Stark weather contrasts: new heat wave is preceded by the risk of severe squalls. All of Germany is talking about the old and the coming heat wave. Regionally, it will be anything but midsummer. Heavy squalls are sometimes not only reminiscent of autumn weather, they pose a serious danger.
la: Stark tempestas adversatur: novus calor fluctus graviore procellis periculo antecedit. Tota Alemannia loquitur de fluctu veteri et de venturo aestu. Tellus, sit nisi solstitio. Grandes procellae interdum non solum autumni tempestates reminiscuntur, sed magnum periculum ponunt.
